title: 2026 Oscars Best Supporting Actor & Actress Winners
text: Amy Madigan, 75, won Best Actress in a Supporting Role for Weapons. Zoe Saldana presented the award. During her acceptance speech, Madigan expressed gratitude to the film's writer and director Zach Cregger, thanking producers and Warner Bros. staff members. She particularly highlighted her husband Ed's role in her success, stating: The most important is my beloved Ed, who's been with me forever. Sean Penn won Best Actor in a Supporting Role but did not attend the ceremony. Kieran Culkin accepted the award on his behalf, explaining: Sean Penn couldn't be here this evening, or didn't want to. According to reporting, Penn's absence may relate to waning interest in Hollywood. He previously told W Magazine that his last enjoyable film work was eighteen years prior on Milk, though he indicated renewed enthusiasm for acting currently. Other Best Supporting Actress nominees included Teyana Taylor, Wunmi Mosaku, Elle Fanning, and Inga Ibsdotter Lilleaas. Best Supporting Actor nominees were Benicio Del Toro, Jacob Elordi, Delroy Lindo, and Stellan Skarsgard. The ceremony was hosted by Conan O'Brien.
